title: impatiens mildbraedii subsp. mildbraedii
intro: Impatiens mildbraedii subsp. mildbraedii, also known as the dwarf balsam, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy in some cultures. Herbal preparations of Impatiens mildbraedii subsp. mildbraedii include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
